name: Tokkuri Tei
tagline: Honolulu's original izakaya — the garlic ahi belly and tofu steak are why reservations fill a week out.
mustOrder: ika yaki (squid pancake, $12–14 — THE signature dish)
parking: Street parking on side streets mauka of Kapahulu
talkStory: Opened early 1990s by chef/owner Hide Yoshimoto (Hide-san) — one of the first authentic izakayas in Hawaii, helped spark the island's izakaya boom.
insiderTips: Order multiple small plates to share — izakaya style means rounds of dishes throughout the evening, not one entree per person. Sake pairing is the proper move — ask staff to guide you. Go Tue/Wed for walk-in seating. Say 'kampai' before your first drink.
